transcript: Whatever, psycho. I'm afraid the Houdini act is over, my friend. Our Father who art in heaven, hallowed be thy name. Oh, this is how it is. Don't kill him. He's supposed to be dead! Presto! police have moved to surround the downtown boutique hotel lint where the unidentified madman behind today's mayhem is believed to be holed up and making a desperate last stand local officials have confirmed gunfire on the sunday our news chopper will be bringing live uncensored coverage from above the hotel momentarily again this coverage is live and uncensored so if you have any small children present you may want to have them leave the room. Get me out of here, now! I'll kill you for this, Julius! Too late! Look out! Thanks, boss! We'll be right back. Oh, my God. Thank you for watching.
